title: Welcome to the Forum!
content: This is a sample post to get you started. Feel free to explore the API using the /docs page or the frontend below.
author: Admin

title: How does FastAPI handle validation?
content: FastAPI uses Pydantic models to automatically validate request bodies. If a required field is missing or has the wrong type, FastAPI returns a 422 error with a detailed explanation.
author: Alice

title: Why use JSON files instead of a real database?
content: For learning purposes, JSON files let you see exactly what is stored without needing to set up a database server. Once you understand CRUD operations here, swapping in SQLite or PostgreSQL is the natural next step.
author: Bob
